title: lorax-templates-rhel bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[9.7-3.0.1]
- Fix text string in Rescue option [Orabug: 37830987]
- Resolve Wayland issue with UEKR8 [Orabug: 37569575]
- Do not install nmap-ncat or libreport-rhel-anaconda-bugzilla into runtime.
- Remove RHCK initrd from runtime image when creating the UEK
  boot ISO. (mark.will@oracle.com) [Orabug: 34085357]
- Dropped redhat-release-eula.
- Updated description and Summary.
- Set permissions under  to 555 [Orabug: 28945615]
- Allow to create UEK boot iso

[9.7-3]
- live-install.tmpl: Fix broken single item tuple (bcl)
  Related: RHEL-108149
- libvirt.tmpl: Fix use of xrange (bcl)
  Related: RHEL-108149
- 80-rhel: Remove unused templates and config files (bcl)
  Resolves: RHEL-108149
- Fix tzselect path in runtime-cleanup.tmpl (jikortus)
  Resolves: RHEL-101453

[9.7-2]
- Set ppc64le default boot to test the media (bcl)
  Resolves: RHEL-93170

[9.7-1]
- Bump release version to 9.7 (bcl)
  Related: RHEL-91930
- Add a boot menu for fips=1 (bcl)
  Resolves: RHEL-91930
full_text:
[9.7-3.0.1]
- Fix text string in Rescue option [Orabug: 37830987]
- Resolve Wayland issue with UEKR8 [Orabug: 37569575]
- Do not install nmap-ncat or libreport-rhel-anaconda-bugzilla into runtime.
- Remove RHCK initrd from runtime image when creating the UEK
  boot ISO. (mark.will@oracle.com) [Orabug: 34085357]
- Dropped redhat-release-eula.
- Updated description and Summary.
- Set permissions under  to 555 [Orabug: 28945615]
- Allow to create UEK boot iso

[9.7-3]
- live-install.tmpl: Fix broken single item tuple (bcl)
  Related: RHEL-108149
- libvirt.tmpl: Fix use of xrange (bcl)
  Related: RHEL-108149
- 80-rhel: Remove unused templates and config files (bcl)
  Resolves: RHEL-108149
- Fix tzselect path in runtime-cleanup.tmpl (jikortus)
  Resolves: RHEL-101453

[9.7-2]
- Set ppc64le default boot to test the media (bcl)
  Resolves: RHEL-93170

[9.7-1]
- Bump release version to 9.7 (bcl)
  Related: RHEL-91930
- Add a boot menu for fips=1 (bcl)
  Resolves: RHEL-91930

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20747.html
